commitment: Protected constitutional predicates cannot be changed as ordinary implementation refactors.
operational_test: Require a migration diff, governance review, rollback path, and residual record before a protected predicate can change.
conflict_behavior: Deny the change or defer to review when the migration record is incomplete.
uncertainty: Migration review quality is not established by this fixture.
review_route: governance review before protected predicate migration
self_modification_rule: A self-modification must reject predicate weakening unless a governance review accepts the migration record.
migration_policy: Every protected predicate migration requires a diff record, review route, rollback path, and residual note.
non_claims: does not prove runtime self-modification safety
does not prove source interpretation adequacy
